LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MISSION NATIONAL BANK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MNB'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE AND IS OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF THE IMPLIED COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING AND CONVERSION. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Set For Trial On Nov-30-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Carling, Esq. 510-379-5801 x202 of Kerley Schafer LLP for Plaintiff.
Edward Donohue, Esq. 415-362-6000 of Hinshaw & Culbertson for Defendant MISSION NATIONAL BANK.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant argues the bad faith claim and conversion claim. Plaintiff responds and agrees with the tentative ruling.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MISSION NATIONAL BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant MNB's demurrer to the first amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend as to the third cause of action for negligence and is overruled as to the second and fourth causes of action for breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing and conversion. (see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the plaintiffs is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
